falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 at any point in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A break below the August 2024 low would invalidate the 78% pattern match to bottom_2024_aug, as the referenced bottom would be violated rather than replicated

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal capitulation-level fear inconsistent with a bottom formation pattern; the August 2024 bottom saw VIX peak at 28.5, so sustained elevation above 35 indicates a different regime entirely

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y-2Y Treasury spread inverts further by >25bps from current levels within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Deepening inversion would contradict recovery/bottom dynamics; the August 2024 bottom coincided with spread steepening, so renewed flattening/inversion signals recession acceleration rather than stabilization

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
